title: WOS Studio (Authoring) — Binding (polymorphic)
description: Polymorphic Studio Binding schema covering ServiceBinding, EventBinding, PolicyEngineBinding, and DMNImport per studio-authoring/specs/binding-and-integration.md. Discriminated by `kind`. The first three project to `$.integration.bindings[*]` of the compiled `$wosWorkflow`; DMNImport is one-way import only (transpiles DMN tables to internal Studio DecisionTable PolicyObjects via FEEL→FEL transpilation; no DMN export). Carries `exercisedByScenarios[]` so every binding declares its contract test (per binding-and-integration.md SA-MUST-bind-070-073).
$comment: Promotion status (Stage-3, 2026-05-01): MVP shape; per-kind body shape is illustrative-and-flexible.

x-lm.intent: Document type marker for Studio Binding objects
Binding kind discriminator — load-bearing for projection routing

exercisedByScenarios.description: Scenario refs that exercise this binding as its contract test (per SA-MUST-bind-070-073). Every binding MUST declare at least one Scenario ref before it can advance to lifecycleState='approved' (lint-pending).

body.description:
Binding body. Shape varies by kind:
- ServiceBinding: `{operationKind: 'openapi'|'arazzo'|'custom', apiSpecRef, operationRef, inputBindings[], outputBindings[]}`
- EventBinding: `{eventName, direction: 'consume'|'emit', cloudEventsExtensions: {woscausationeventid?, woscorrelationkey?}}`
- PolicyEngineBinding: `{engineKind: 'opa'|'cedar'|'xacml'|'custom', endpoint, decisionMapping, reasonsMapping?, obligationsMapping?}`
- DMNImport: `{sourceDmnUri, dmnXml?, sourceDecisionId, feelToFelMapping: {transpilerVersion, transpiledAt, issues[]}, producedDecisionTableRef}`
